caption.full:
Marcello Hernández hosted the ESPYs.

Marcello Hernández made his ESPYs hosting debut at the David H. Koch Theater. He joked that Tiger Woods will appear in the next 'Grand Theft Auto' and compared Bill Belichick's age to his girlfriend's current age when the Knicks won their 1973 NBA title.

Which roast landed the hardest for you — Tiger Woods or Bill Belichick?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#ESPYs #MarcelloHernandez #TigerWoods #BillBelichick
caption.firstComment: I’m still laughing at the Belichick age crack — what did you think of Hernández’s take on the wedding skip?

youtube.title: Tiger Woods Roasted by Marcello Hernández at ESPYs
youtube.description:
Tiger Woods was a target of jokes from host Marcello Hernández during the ESPYs ceremony. Hernández also teased Bill Belichick and Jake Paul, while notably skipping Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's recent wedding. This was Hernández's first time hosting the event.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
